title: ulmus bergmanniana var. bergmanniana
intro: Ulmus bergmanniana var. bergmanniana, also known as Bergmann's elm, is a plant species within the Ulmaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bergmann's elm include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, taken in capsule form, or applied topically as a tincture to reap its medicinal benefits.
